text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information, just like humans do. Two key tasks in computer vision are image recognition and object detection. Image recognition identifies what is in a picture, such as a cat or a tree. Object detection goes further by locating and labeling multiple objects within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision systems detect traffic signs, pedestrians, and other vehicles to navigate safely. Beyond transportation, computer vision is also used in healthcare, security cameras, and smartphone cameras to improve our daily lives.
